title: Template Manifest Row
description: One row in the _manifest Google Sheet. Defines a document template available to humans and agents.

id.description: Stable kebab-case identifier for this template (e.g. 'nda-kuill-pilot'). Never changes.

category.description: Top-level category. Matches the Doc-templates/ subfolder.

name.description: Human-readable display name shown in sidebar and agent catalog (e.g. 'NDA Kuill Pilot').

description.description: One-sentence description shown to humans and fed to LLM for template selection.

template_file_id.description: Drive file ID of the master template document (Google Doc/Slides/Sheet with {{TOKEN}} placeholders).

output_folder_id.description: Drive folder ID where generated documents are placed.

naming_pattern.description: Go-style template for the output document name. Tokens: {{cliente}}, {{YYYY-MM}}, {{role}}, etc. Must produce a name with no spaces (use hyphens).

tokens_schema.description: JSON string of a simplified schema: {"tokenName": {"type": "string", "description": "...", "required": true}}. Stored as JSON string in the Sheet cell.

required_inputs.description: JSON array string of token names that MUST be provided before rendering. Agent returns MISSING_INPUTS if any are absent.

suggested_sources.description: JSON array string of Drive folder paths or keywords the agent should search before generating. Helps doc-context assemble the input pack.

doc_type.description: Type of the master template, determines which Google App to use when cloning.

owner.description: Email of the template owner (responsible for keeping it up to date).

version.description: Semver of the template (e.g. '1.0.0'). Recorded in Registry when a doc is generated from this template.

active.description: If false, template is hidden from sidebar catalog and not returned by listTemplates.
